revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Culture_of_region here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Culture_of_region for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Sidebar with collapsible lists
| name = {{{name|}}}
| style = {{#if: {{{backcolour|}}} | background-color:{{{backcolour}}}; }}
| pretitle = {{#if: {{{series|{{#ifexist: Category:{{{region}}} | y }}}}} | Part of [[:Category:{{{series|{{{region}}}}}}|a series]] on the }}
| title = {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | Culture of {{{region}}} | Culture of {{{region}}} | {{Normalwraplink|1= Culture of {{{region}}} }} }}
| titlestyle = {{#if: {{{titlefontsize|}}} | font-size:{{{titlefontsize|}}}; }}{{#if: {{{titlecolour|}}} | background-color:{{{titlecolour}}}; }}border-bottom: 1px solid #aaa
| image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage
  | image = {{{image|}}}
  | size = {{{imagesize|}}}
  | sizedefault = frameless
  | alt = {{{alt|}}}
  | border = {{{border|}}}
  }}
| imageclass = photo
| caption = {{{caption|}}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;line-height:1.6;{{#if: {{{titlecolour|}}} | background-color:{{{titlecolour}}}; }}
| listtitlestyle = {{#if: {{{titlecolour|}}} | background-color:{{{titlecolour}}}; }}
| centered list titles = y
| expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}

| list1name = History
| {{#if: {{{histtopics|}}} | list1title | heading1 }} = {{Linkexist|History of {{{region}}}|History|{{{histoverride|}}}|{{{ethnotopics|}}}}}
| list1 =
{{{histtopics|}}}

| list2name = People
| {{#if: {{{ethnotopics|}}} | list2title | heading2 }} = {{Linkexist|Ethnic groups in {{{region}}}|People|{{{ethnooverride|}}}}}
| list2 =
{{{ethnotopics|}}}

| list3name = Languages
| {{#if: {{{langtopics|}}} | list3title | heading3 }} = {{Linkexist|Languages of {{{region}}}|Languages|{{{langoverride|}}}|{{{langtopics|}}}}}
| list3 =
{{{langtopics|}}}

| list4name = Traditions
| {{#if: {{{tradtopics|}}}|list4title|heading4}} = {{Linkexist|Traditions of {{{region}}}|Traditions|{{{tradoverride|}}}|{{{tradtopics|}}}}}
| list4 =
{{{tradtopics|}}}

| list5name = Mythology and folklore
| {{#if: {{{mythtopics|}}}{{{folktopics|}}} | list5title | heading5 }} = {{Enum
  | 1 = {{Linkexist|Mythology of {{{region}}}|Mythology|{{{mythoverride|}}}|{{{mythtopics|}}}}}
  | 2 = {{Linkexist|Folklore of {{{region}}}|folklore|{{{folkoverride|}}}|{{{folktopics|}}}}}
  }}
| list5 =
{{{mythtopics|}}}
{{{folktopics|}}}

| list6name = Cuisine
| {{#if: {{{cuistopics|}}} | list6title | heading6 }} = {{Linkexist|Cuisine of {{{region}}}|Cuisine|{{{cuisoverride|}}}|{{{cuistopics|}}}}}
| list6 =
{{{cuistopics|}}}

| list7name = Festivals
| {{#if: {{{festtopics|}}} | list7title | heading7 }} = {{Linkexist|Festivals of {{{region}}}|Festivals|{{{festoverride|}}}|{{{festtopics|}}}}}
| list7 =
{{{festtopics|}}}

| list8name = Religion
| {{#if: {{{reltopics|}}} | list8title | heading8 }} = {{Linkexist|Religion in {{{region}}}|Religion|{{{reloverride|}}}|{{{reltopics|}}}}}
| list8 =
{{{reltopics|}}}

| list9name = Art
| {{#if: {{{arttopics|}}} | list9title | heading9 }} = {{Linkexist|Art of {{{region}}}|Art|{{{artoverride|}}}|{{{arttopics|}}}}}
| list9 =
{{{arttopics|}}}

|list10name = Literature
|{{#if: {{{littopics|}}} | list10title | heading10 }} = {{Linkexist|Literature of {{{region}}}|Literature|{{{litoverride|}}}|{{{littopics|}}}}}
|list10 =
{{{littopics|}}}

| list11name = Music and performing arts
| {{#if: {{{musictopics|}}}{{{patopics|}}} | list11title | heading11 }} = {{Enum
  | 1 = {{Linkexist|Music of {{{region}}}|Music|{{{musicoverride|}}}|{{{musictopics|}}}}}
  | 2 = {{Linkexist|Performing art of {{{region}}}|performing arts|{{{paoverride|}}}|{{{patopics|}}}}}
  }}
| list11 =
{{{musitopics|}}}
{{{patopics|}}}

| list12name = Media
| list12title = {{Linkexist|Media in {{{region}}}|Media|{{{mediaoverride|}}}|y}}
| list12 = {{#ifexist: Radio in {{{region}}} |
* [[Radio in {{{region}}}|Radio]]
  }}{{#ifexist: Television in {{{region}}} |
* [[Television in {{{region}}}|Television]]
  }}{{#ifexist: {{{cinemaoverride|Cinema of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{cinemaoverride|Cinema of {{{region}}}}}}|Cinema]]
  }}
{{{mediatopics|}}}

| list13name = Sport
| {{#if: {{{sporttopics|}}} | list13title | heading13 }} = {{Linkexist|Sport in {{{region}}}|Sport|{{{sportoverride|}}}|{{{sporttopics|}}}}}
| list13 =
{{{sporttopics|}}}

|list14name = Monuments
|{{#if: {{#ifexist: List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}} | y }}{{{monutopics|}}}
   | list14title | heading14 }} = {{Linkexist|Monuments of {{{region}}}|Monuments|{{{monuoverride|}}}| {{#ifexist: List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}} | y }}{{{monutopics|}}} }}
|list14 = {{#ifexist: List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}} |
* [[List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}}|World Heritage Sites]]
  }}
{{{monutopics|}}}

|list15name = Symbols
|{{#if: {{#ifexist: {{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{{symbtopics|}}}
  | list15title | heading15
  }} = {{Linkexist|Symbols of {{{region}}}|Symbols|{{{symboverride|}}}| {{#ifexist: {{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{{symbtopics|}}} }}
|list15 = {{#ifexist: {{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}}|Flag]]
  }}{{#ifexist: {{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}}|Coat of arms]]
  }}{{#ifexist: {{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}}|National anthem]]
  }}
{{{symbtopics|}}}

|list16name = Organisations
|{{#if: {{{orgtopics|}}} | list16title | heading16 }} = {{Linkexist|Organisations of {{{region}}}|Organisations|{{{orgoverride|}}}|{{{orgtopics|}}}}}
|list16 = {{{orgtopics|}}}

|below = {{#switch: {{lc:{{{noportal|}}}}}
  |yes|y|true|t|1=
  |#default= {{#if: {{{portaloverride|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{region}}} | y }}}}} |
* {{Portal-inline|{{{portaloverride|{{{region}}}}}}| size = tiny }}
  }}}}

}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- Place category and language links on the /doc sub-page, not here -->
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Culture_of_region for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Sidebar with collapsible lists
| name = {{{name|}}}
| style = {{#if: {{{backcolour|}}} | background-color:{{{backcolour}}}; }}
| pretitle = {{#if: {{{series|{{#ifexist: Category:{{{region}}} | y }}}}} | Part of [[:Category:{{{series|{{{region}}}}}}|a series]] on the }}
| title = {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | Culture of {{{region}}} | Culture of {{{region}}} | {{Normalwraplink|1= Culture of {{{region}}} }} }}
| titlestyle = {{#if: {{{titlefontsize|}}} | font-size:{{{titlefontsize|}}}; }}{{#if: {{{titlecolour|}}} | background-color:{{{titlecolour}}}; }}border-bottom: 1px solid #aaa
| image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage
  | image = {{{image|}}}
  | size = {{{imagesize|}}}
  | sizedefault = frameless
  | alt = {{{alt|}}}
  | border = {{{border|}}}
  }}
| imageclass = photo
| caption = {{{caption|}}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;line-height:1.6;{{#if: {{{titlecolour|}}} | background-color:{{{titlecolour}}}; }}
| listtitlestyle = {{#if: {{{titlecolour|}}} | background-color:{{{titlecolour}}}; }}
| centered list titles = y
| expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}

| list1name = History
| {{#if: {{{histtopics|}}} | list1title | heading1 }} = {{Linkexist|History of {{{region}}}|History|{{{histoverride|}}}|{{{ethnotopics|}}}}}
| list1 =
{{{histtopics|}}}

| list2name = People
| {{#if: {{{ethnotopics|}}} | list2title | heading2 }} = {{Linkexist|Ethnic groups in {{{region}}}|People|{{{ethnooverride|}}}}}
| list2 =
{{{ethnotopics|}}}

| list3name = Languages
| {{#if: {{{langtopics|}}} | list3title | heading3 }} = {{Linkexist|Languages of {{{region}}}|Languages|{{{langoverride|}}}|{{{langtopics|}}}}}
| list3 =
{{{langtopics|}}}

| list4name = Traditions
| {{#if: {{{tradtopics|}}}|list4title|heading4}} = {{Linkexist|Traditions of {{{region}}}|Traditions|{{{tradoverride|}}}|{{{tradtopics|}}}}}
| list4 =
{{{tradtopics|}}}

| list5name = Mythology and folklore
| {{#if: {{{mythtopics|}}}{{{folktopics|}}} | list5title | heading5 }} = {{Enum
  | 1 = {{Linkexist|Mythology of {{{region}}}|Mythology|{{{mythoverride|}}}|{{{mythtopics|}}}}}
  | 2 = {{Linkexist|Folklore of {{{region}}}|folklore|{{{folkoverride|}}}|{{{folktopics|}}}}}
  }}
| list5 =
{{{mythtopics|}}}
{{{folktopics|}}}

| list6name = Cuisine
| {{#if: {{{cuistopics|}}} | list6title | heading6 }} = {{Linkexist|Cuisine of {{{region}}}|Cuisine|{{{cuisoverride|}}}|{{{cuistopics|}}}}}
| list6 =
{{{cuistopics|}}}

| list7name = Festivals
| {{#if: {{{festtopics|}}} | list7title | heading7 }} = {{Linkexist|Festivals of {{{region}}}|Festivals|{{{festoverride|}}}|{{{festtopics|}}}}}
| list7 =
{{{festtopics|}}}

| list8name = Religion
| {{#if: {{{reltopics|}}} | list8title | heading8 }} = {{Linkexist|Religion in {{{region}}}|Religion|{{{reloverride|}}}|{{{reltopics|}}}}}
| list8 =
{{{reltopics|}}}

| list9name = Art
| {{#if: {{{arttopics|}}} | list9title | heading9 }} = {{Linkexist|Art of {{{region}}}|Art|{{{artoverride|}}}|{{{arttopics|}}}}}
| list9 =
{{{arttopics|}}}

|list10name = Literature
|{{#if: {{{littopics|}}} | list10title | heading10 }} = {{Linkexist|Literature of {{{region}}}|Literature|{{{litoverride|}}}|{{{littopics|}}}}}
|list10 =
{{{littopics|}}}

| list11name = Music and performing arts
| {{#if: {{{musictopics|}}}{{{patopics|}}} | list11title | heading11 }} = {{Enum
  | 1 = {{Linkexist|Music of {{{region}}}|Music|{{{musicoverride|}}}|{{{musictopics|}}}}}
  | 2 = {{Linkexist|Performing art of {{{region}}}|performing arts|{{{paoverride|}}}|{{{patopics|}}}}}
  }}
| list11 =
{{{musitopics|}}}
{{{patopics|}}}

| list12name = Media
| list12title = {{Linkexist|Media in {{{region}}}|Media|{{{mediaoverride|}}}|y}}
| list12 = {{#ifexist: Radio in {{{region}}} |
* [[Radio in {{{region}}}|Radio]]
  }}{{#ifexist: Television in {{{region}}} |
* [[Television in {{{region}}}|Television]]
  }}{{#ifexist: {{{cinemaoverride|Cinema of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{cinemaoverride|Cinema of {{{region}}}}}}|Cinema]]
  }}
{{{mediatopics|}}}

| list13name = Sport
| {{#if: {{{sporttopics|}}} | list13title | heading13 }} = {{Linkexist|Sport in {{{region}}}|Sport|{{{sportoverride|}}}|{{{sporttopics|}}}}}
| list13 =
{{{sporttopics|}}}

|list14name = Monuments
|{{#if: {{#ifexist: List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}} | y }}{{{monutopics|}}}
   | list14title | heading14 }} = {{Linkexist|Monuments of {{{region}}}|Monuments|{{{monuoverride|}}}| {{#ifexist: List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}} | y }}{{{monutopics|}}} }}
|list14 = {{#ifexist: List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}} |
* [[List of World Heritage Sites in {{{region}}}|World Heritage Sites]]
  }}
{{{monutopics|}}}

|list15name = Symbols
|{{#if: {{#ifexist: {{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{{symbtopics|}}}
  | list15title | heading15
  }} = {{Linkexist|Symbols of {{{region}}}|Symbols|{{{symboverride|}}}| {{#ifexist: {{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{#ifexist: {{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}} | y }}{{{symbtopics|}}} }}
|list15 = {{#ifexist: {{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{flagoverride|Flag of {{{region}}}}}}|Flag]]
  }}{{#ifexist: {{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{armsoverride|Coat of arms of {{{region}}}}}}|Coat of arms]]
  }}{{#ifexist: {{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}} |
* [[{{{anthemoverride|National anthem of {{{region}}}}}}|National anthem]]
  }}
{{{symbtopics|}}}

|list16name = Organisations
|{{#if: {{{orgtopics|}}} | list16title | heading16 }} = {{Linkexist|Organisations of {{{region}}}|Organisations|{{{orgoverride|}}}|{{{orgtopics|}}}}}
|list16 = {{{orgtopics|}}}

|below = {{#switch: {{lc:{{{noportal|}}}}}
  |yes|y|true|t|1=
  |#default= {{#if: {{{portaloverride|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{region}}} | y }}}}} |
* {{Portal-inline|{{{portaloverride|{{{region}}}}}}| size = tiny }}
  }}}}

}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
